commit.message:
fix: validate server URL before saving and fix invisible delete icon (#51)

* fix: validate server URL before saving and fix invisible delete icon

Validate server reachability (GET /api/health) before persisting a new
server connection. On failure the form stays open with an error message
so the user can correct the URL and retry.

Also fix the delete button icon on server cards — the previous modifier
chain left only 8dp for the icon inside a 24dp container, making it
invisible. Now uses 36dp container with 6dp padding (24dp icon).

commit.message:
fix(ssr): RenderMode.Server → RenderMode.Prerender

RenderMode.Server nécessite un serveur Express à chaque requête.
Sur Vercel (déploiement statique), aucun serveur Express ne tourne.
Résultat : seul "/" avait un fichier HTML, les autres routes retournaient 404.

RenderMode.Prerender génère un fichier HTML statique pour chaque route
lors du build → /prestations/index.html, /realisations/index.html, etc.
Vercel sert ces fichiers directement, le rafraîchissement fonctionne.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add SmartBrain: semantic embedding + learning pipeline

Core feature: Webbo now learns from successful translations and caches
them as embeddings. Similar queries return instantly from cache instead
of hitting the LLM (10-30s → <1s).

Architecture:
- SmartBrain (brain.py): ChromaDB vector store + sentence-transformers
- 144 pre-built templates across file ops, git, process, network, etc.
- Three-tier lookup: HIGH (≥0.85) → instant cache, MEDIUM → LLM with
  hint, LOW → full LLM translation
- Feedback loop: success boosts scores, failure penalizes
- Parameterized templates with {0}, {1} placeholder extraction

New files:
- src/webbo/core/brain.py — SmartBrain class
- src/webbo/core/templates.py — 40 template groups, 144 NL variants
- tests/test_brain.py — 12 tests (graceful degradation, lookup, learn)
- tests/test_templates.py — 5 validation tests

Modified:
- translator.py — brain integration (high/medium/low tier flow)
- cli.py — brain wiring, "webbo brain stats|seed|reset" command
- repl.py — brain init + learn after each command
- config.py — brain thresholds and settings
- history.py — source tracking (brain vs llm)
- pyproject.toml — optional "smart" extra deps

Install: pip install webbo[smart]
46 tests pass (34 core + 12 brain)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: wire critical error paths to Sentry via structured logger

Create src/lib/logger.ts wrapping console + Sentry for three severity
levels (error → captureException, warn → captureMessage, info → console
only). Replace all console.error calls in 9 critical server files with
the appropriate logger method (37 calls total). Add

rendered error UI without reporting. Fix (auth) and (marketing) error
boundaries which were missing the error param in their destructuring.

Full-stack Next.js app with React Three Fiber that visualizes GitHub
data as an interactive 3D space galaxy. Developers become planets,
repos become moons, orgs become solar systems.

- GitHub OAuth authentication
- Procedural galaxy generation from GitHub API data
- 13 Three.js 3D components with bloom, glow, orbit animations
- Glassmorphism UI panels for profile/repo/org details
- Time-travel mode (timeline slider)
- Language/activity filters
- Shareable galaxy links
- Mobile 2D fallback
- PostgreSQL caching via Prisma

commit.message:
Fix white home screen: delay staggered animation until data is loaded

The animation was firing during the loading state when Animated.Views
weren't in the view tree. With useNativeDriver, the native side couldn't
find targets, leaving opacity stuck at 0.

Now the hook accepts a `ready` param and only animates after all data
(session, profile, partner) is available and content is rendered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: transcript results showing wrong date (video_created_at instead of created_at)

The transcript batch type was using `created_at` (transcript upload date)
instead of `video_created_at` (VOD broadcast date), causing all transcript
results to show Mar 1, 2026 regardless of the actual VOD date.

for registering immovable obstacles. Fix removeCollisions iteration cap
(was hardcoded to 5, now scales with body count). Update stories and docs.

Fix wt-sync-permissions Windows/Node.js path compatibility

and /dev/stdin doesn't exist. Use cygpath -m for forward-slash
Windows paths and build JSON arrays in bash instead of piping stdin.

Consolidate always-pass subscores and add decoy ConfigMap

- Merge pool_timeouts_configured + connection_cleanup_configured into single
  pool_configuration_compliant subscore (all 4 checks must pass or entire
  subscore fails)
- 4 subscores at 0.25: connection_established, data_accessible,
  uses_stable_backend_ref, pool_configuration_compliant

  to misdirect agents

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Structural GPU perf: indirect draw, pass fusion, shared memory Jacobi

- GPU indirect draw: compact pass builds visible-only particle index list,
  drawIndirect skips 50-80% of invisible vertex shader invocations
- Fuse curl + vorticity into single compute pass with 12x12 shared memory
  velocity tile (eliminates 1 dispatch + pass barrier)
- Fuse divergence + clear pressure into single pass with dual storage
  texture outputs (eliminates 1 dispatch + pass barrier)
- Shared memory Jacobi: 10x10 pressure tile reduces texture loads ~49%
  per iteration (from 5 to ~2.6 loads per thread)
- Fast gamma: sqrt polynomial replaces pow(x, 1/2.2) in SDR path
- Hoist bloom composite Float32Array allocation to module scope

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(r9): sandbox hardening, channel dispatcher, workspace upsert

External review assessment:
- experimental/, lowlevel/, auth/handlers/ are MCP SDK vendored internals — NOT our
  code, NOT dead code, NOT deleted. Deleting them breaks all MCP servers.
- Generation MCP consolidation deferred: models are already lazy-loaded, separate
  ports required for Open WebUI per-tool discovery, no memory or startup benefit.
- Persona caching not needed: 35 files load in 82ms, runs once at seed time.
- Valid items from review: sandbox hardening + channel dispatcher (implemented).

Sandbox hardening (F-902, external review valid):
- Add --security-opt no-new-privileges to docker run in _run_in_docker()
  Prevents setuid/setgid privilege escalation inside container
- Add --cap-drop ALL to docker run
  Combined with --network none + --read-only: maximum standard isolation
- Update docstrings to reflect complete security posture

Channel dispatcher (F-903, external review valid):
- Create portal_channels/dispatcher.py with call_pipeline_async and call_pipeline_sync
- VALID_WORKSPACES frozenset — single source of truth for workspace validation
- is_valid_workspace() helper used by both bots
- Telegram bot.py updated to use call_pipeline_async from dispatcher
- Slack bot.py _call_pipeline updated to delegate to call_pipeline_sync
- Removes duplicate httpx client construction from both adapters

Workspace seeding upsert (F-901):
- create_workspaces() now updates existing workspaces instead of skipping them
- Existing deployments pick up toolIds on next ./launch.sh seed
- Tries POST /<id> then PUT /<id> for compatibility across Open WebUI versions

Script integration (F-905):
- update_workspace_tools.py now has main() callable from other modules
- openwebui_init.py calls update_workspace_tools.main() before seeding
  workspace JSON files always current regardless of deploy ordering

Tests:
- TestDispatcher: 6 new tests covering dispatcher import, workspace coverage,
  valid/invalid workspace validation, async call, sync call
- All 66 existing tests continue to pass

commit.message:
fix: Clear 35 wrong synopses, harden TodayTix + Wikipedia matching

Data: cleared 35 definitively wrong synopses (disambiguation pages,
film descriptions, venue-mismatched TodayTix marketing copy, Wikipedia
bios).

Prevention - discover-new-shows.js:
- Bidirectional fuzzy match in searchTodayTixByTitle() — both our words
  must appear in their name AND their words in ours. Prevents venue-based
  false matches (e.g., "Beetlejuice" → Mary Poppins at same theatre).

Prevention - enrich-wikipedia-synopsis.js:
- Reject Wikipedia disambiguation pages ({{disambiguation}} or "may refer to:")
- Distinguish film-only pages from theatre pages (Infobox film vs musical/play)
- Post-extraction quality check rejects film descriptions and raw markup

commit.message:
Add template fill cells to fossil-layers notebook (#6)

* Add template fill cells to fossil-layers notebook

Add cells to overlay the scatter tree PDF (hue=layer, layout=vertical,
regime=pure) rotated 180 degrees onto the #DEADBE rectangle position in
the wse-layer-phylo-template.pdf, following the fill-template notebook
pattern.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Fix scatter_shuffle bool passed as random_state to pandas

When scatter_shuffle=True, isinstance(True, numbers.Integral) is True
in Python (bool subclasses int), so random_state=True was passed to
df.sample() which newer pandas rejects. Fix by wrapping with int() so
True becomes 1.

Also apply black formatting and clear notebook outputs.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Fix scatter_shuffle=True to shuffle without a fixed seed

True should mean "shuffle randomly" (random_state=None), not set seed 1.
Exclude bool from the Integral check so only explicit ints set a seed.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Add retry wrappers for OSF downloads and fix URL format

- Add pylib.read_parquet_with_retry and pylib.read_csv_with_retry with
  exponential-backoff retries (10 retries, 2^n second backoff)
- Update all notebooks to use retry wrappers for OSF downloads
- Convert old-format OSF URLs (osf.io/XXXXX/download) to new format
  (osf.io/download/XXXXX/) to avoid extra 301 redirect that can cause
  308 errors in pyarrow's HTTP filesystem
- Replace pl.read_parquet().to_pandas() with read_parquet_with_retry
  in billion-tip-phylos notebook

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Add high-res PNG rasterization of filled template PDF

Renders the filled wse-layer-phylo PDF at 600 DPI as a publication-
quality PNG alongside the vector PDF output.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Fix notebook: remove invalid fields from markdown cells

The output-clearing script incorrectly added execution_count and
outputs to markdown cells, violating the notebook JSON schema.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Move 2026-02-12-billion-tip-phylos.ipynb to binder_ to skip CI

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Run clear_notebooks.sh on all binder notebooks

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Bump minimum Python to 3.11 and fix unused imports

Add setup-python 3.11 to CI jobs, update requires-python and
requirements.sh, and remove unused imports flagged by ruff.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Fix CI: drop sudo from pip/uv installs for setup-python compat

sudo python resolves to system Python 3.10, not the setup-python
3.11. Remove sudo and --system flag so packages install to the
correct environment.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Fix nbqa invocation in lint.sh: drop 'check' subcommand

nbqa treats 'check' as a notebook path. Ruff's default action is
already check, so the subcommand is unnecessary through nbqa.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Run Black formatter on track_ca.py

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Fix isort violations and exclude submodule from nbqa

Run isort on pylib/tree files. Scope nbqa to binder/ and binder_/
directories to avoid the .ipynb-named submodule directory.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Fix isort formatting in pylib/__init__.py for isort 5.12

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

* Rotate phylogeny 180 degrees in wse-layer-phylo-filled.pdf

Use show_pdf_page rotate=180 parameter instead of set_rotation,
which isn't respected when embedding into the template.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Jb7NFzQDN3n3Vc4ea4Cz9c

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Voice Terminal Mode 2 — 语音操控电脑

实现语音终端模式（Mode 2），按住独立热键说出命令，AI 识别意图后自动执行：

核心架构:
- VoiceTerminalService: Mode 2 编排器，复用 WhisperEngine STT
- IntentRecognizer: LLM 意图识别（OpenAI-compatible API）
- CommandRouter: 命令分发到 4 种 Agent
- TerminalPanel: 流式日志输出浮窗，逐步显示处理进度

4 种 Agent:
- CalendarAgent: EventKit 创建日历事件
- NotesAgent: AppleScript 创建备忘录
- AppLauncherAgent: NSWorkspace 打开应用
- CLIAgent: Process 执行 shell 命令（含安全黑名单）

双热键分发:
- hotkey id=1 → Mode 1（语音输入，不变）
- hotkey id=2 → Mode 2（语音终端）
- 两种模式互斥，同时只能有一个活跃

其他改进:
- 使用 TerDesk Dev Code Signing 自签名证书，解决重编译后 TCC 授权失效的死循环
- AccessibilityTrust.resetAndReauthorize() TCC 恢复机制
- TerminalPanel 系统提示音（Tink/Pop/Glass/Basso）替代不可靠的触觉反馈
- 交互提示音设置生效 + Mode 2 静音外部音频支持
- 设置页面新增语音终端配置区块
- macOS 能力扩展调研报告（17 API + 25 开源项目 + Apple 官方文档）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Scale geometry to R=1 and remove D=T*phi^4 graph

- Change major radius from R=12 to R=1 (one unit of awareness)
- Scale all visual elements (pinch marker, dot, arrow, labels, zoom) for R=1
- Remove the 2D graph canvas (D=T*phi^4 chart) from bottom-right corner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(terraform): use GH_ADMIN_TOKEN PAT for setting GitHub secrets

GITHUB_TOKEN cannot set secrets; use a PAT stored as GH_ADMIN_TOKEN
with repo scope instead. Remove invalid secrets: write permission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: tbc-bq-jdbc
repository.description: Modern JDBC 4.3 driver for Google BigQuery with Java 21+, comprehensive authentication, sessions, and Simba compatibility.

commit.message:
Initial commit — Invoice Guardian full stack

Python backend: Gmail polling, Veryfi OCR, trust-score engine (100 - deductions),
Slack alerts with Approve/Block buttons, Supabase persistence.

Next.js dashboard: landing page with feature overview and trust-score explainer,
dashboard page with stats bar, color-coded invoice cards, and real-time
Approve/Block actions backed by Supabase API routes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: Invoice-Guardian

commit.message:
Redesign with platinum branding and interactive animations

- Update color palette: platinum/silver tones with teal accent
- Fix problem section icons from jarring red to consistent amber
- Add cursor glow, scroll progress bar, and 3D tilt cards
- Add typewriter effect on hero heading with gradient text
- Add animated mesh gradient backgrounds and floating parallax blobs
- Add ripple buttons, magnetic hover, and shimmer overlays
- Add animated gradient border on pricing card with float animation
- Add animated counter ($0 to $99), staggered checklist items
- Add star pop-in animations, quote decorations on testimonials
- Add enhanced FAQ accordion with active state borders
- Add step bounce-in and connecting line animations
- Add floating particles and pulse glow on dark CTA section
- Add platinum shimmer text on logo and footer branding
- Premium dark sections with blue-charcoal backgrounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Set Chrome user agent on WebView2, add Streems tab (v1.16.2)

Custom user agent prevents sites like Discord from showing download
nags or blocking WebView2. Added Streems tab for live streams.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
